Yashasvi Jaiswal Names Shubman Gill Most Hard-Working Player

Dec 11, 2025 • 8JJ Sports

Yashasvi Jaiswal Names Shubman Gill Most Hard-Working Player

Shubman Gill has been recognized as the most hard-working player in the Indian cricket team, according to opener Yashasvi Jaiswal.
